message:
feat: add activity trend sparkline to leaderboard (#1549)

- Generate weekly_activity (12-week contribution counts) and
  recent_activity_score (recency-weighted, 3-week half-life) in
  generate-leaderboard.mjs during the daily data generation
- Render inline SVG sparkline bars in each leaderboard row showing
  contribution cadence over the last 12 weeks
- Add sortable Activity column — click to sort by most recently
  active contributors; click Points to return to default ranking
- activity_weeks metadata array included in leaderboard.json for
  tooltip labels on hover

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
